programs.title: Harley Davidson And The Marlboro Man
programs.desc: Mickey Rourke and Don Johnson star in this four-lane genre collision of biker movie, heist thriller, buddy flick and sci-fi pic that will take you to the hardline of action and adventure! Co-starring Tom Sizemore, Chelsea Field and Vanessa Williams.

programs.title: No Way Out
programs.desc: Kevin Costner and Gene Hackman star in this taut, political thriller that sees Costner, as Naval Commander Tom Farrell, on the hunt for a very real killer and a very unreal Russian mole, and all the clues lead back to himself. Sean Young co-stars.

programs.title: The Package
programs.desc: Gene Hackman and Tommy Lee Jones headline this explosive action-thriller about Green Beret (Hackman) who uncovers a terrifying military conspiracy when he is tasked with escorting a U.S. soldier (Jones) back to the States for a court martial.

programs.title: Cutter's Way
programs.desc: Suspected of murder, Richard Bone (Jeff Bridges) turns to his best friend, Alex Cutter (John Heard), for help finding the real killer. But when their suspect turns the tables on them, a cunning game of cat-and-mouse ignites into a full-blown war!

programs.title: Blown Away
programs.desc: When an explosion jolts Boston, bomb squad expert Jimmy Dove (Jeff Bridges) is thrust into the most harrowing work of his career. And when evidence points to his former mentor (Tommy Lee Jones), Dove must face a bitter enemy and a haunting past.

programs.title: The Killer Elite
programs.desc: James Caan and Robert Duvall give stellar performances in this tense, action-packed thriller that explores betrayal in the murky world of assassins.
